title: ampelopsis radicantissima
intro: Ampelopsis radicantissima, also known as Chinese ampelopsis or woodbine, is a type of woody vine native to China that belongs to the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ampelopsis radicantissima include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Ampelopsis radicantissima can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
